name: Weekly status report
description: Every Monday at 08:00 UTC a reporting agent composes a status report and delivers it to a recipient role for review. Publishing this workflow with the schedule enabled starts the weekly cadence.

steps.prompt: Compose this week's status report for the team. Structure it as: highlights, in progress, risks, and plans for next week. Keep it concise and factual.

human.message: The weekly status report is ready: {{steps.compose.text}}

agents.label: Reporting agent
agents.description: Agent that gathers this week's updates and composes the report.

roles.label: Recipient role
roles.description: Role whose holders receive and review the weekly report.

channels.label: Delivery channel
channels.description: Channel the report is delivered on.
